questions.question: John says God is what, and in him there is no darkness at all?
questions.feedback: God is light; in him there is no darkness at all.

questions.question: What does John say happens if we confess our sins?
options: God is faithful and just to forgive us
questions.correct: God is faithful and just to forgive us
questions.feedback: If we confess our sins, God is faithful and just to forgive us and cleanse us.

questions.question: John says if we claim to be without sin we deceive ourselves.
questions.feedback: If we claim to be without sin, we deceive ourselves and the truth is not in us.

questions.question: The blood of Jesus his Son purifies us from all _____.
questions.feedback: The blood of Jesus purifies us from all sin.

questions.question: John writes so that his readers' _____ may be complete.
questions.feedback: John writes these things so that their joy may be complete.
